case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O VS MAPLE CONSTANCE, R/O

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAPLE CONSTANCE,  R/O
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $765.74 FILED BY MAPLE CONSTANCE,  R/O AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MAPLE CONSTANCE,  R/O RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O $765.74 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $778.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $706.86 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O AS TO DEFENDANT MAPLE CONSTANCE,  R/O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO RICHARD WRENER (YELLO CAB) SHOWS ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC R O IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAPLE CONSTANCE,  R/O STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
